prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约30600→37700→33600→31400→39200名，整体波动较大，2022年大幅后移至37700名后2023–2024年有所回升，但2025年再次大幅后移至39200名，创近五年新低，显示近年报考热度波动明显，2025年基准约39237名；该校在云南省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年73人、2022年81人、2023年81人、2024年74人、2025年101人；2026年计划101人，与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，计划因素对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第135名，近年排名从2021年第165名持续上升至第135名，学校综合实力稳步提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；该校2022年曾因宿舍条件等出现偏负面舆情，但近三年（2024–2026年）无重大声誉事件记录；抖音热度总排名第58位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，报考关注度一般，无明显热度异常信号；该校在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上学科，整体学科实力以B类为主，农林、医学、师范为传统特色，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关专业大类热度整体平稳；云南省2026年普通高考报名总人数约37.79万人，较2025年28.57万人大幅增长约32%，按2025年物理类占比60.7%估算，2026年物理类考生约22.94万人，较2025年17.33万人增加约5.6万人，考生规模显著扩大将加剧竞争；石河子大学位于新疆，距云南较远，地域偏好对该校在云南的报考热度有一定抑制作用，但作为211高校仍具性价比吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已大幅后移至39237名、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、云南省考生总数大幅增长约32%导致竞争加剧、学校排名稳步上升但无A类学科支撑等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约40037名，区间39537–40537名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 30600 → 37700 → 33600 → 31400 → 39200, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2022, there was a large drop to 37700, followed by a recovery in 2023–2024, but in 2025, it dropped again sharply to 39200, a five-year low, indicating notable volatility in application popularity in recent years, with a 2025 baseline of about 39237. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Yunnan Province was 73 in 2021, 81 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 74 in 2024, and 101 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 101, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, so the plan factor has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 135th, with a steady rise from 165th in 2021 to 135th, indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, there was some negative public opinion due to dormitory conditions, but no major reputation incidents have been recorded in the past three years (2024–2026). Its Douyin popularity ranks 58th overall (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure and general application attention, showing no obvious abnormal heat signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level, and agriculture, forestry, medicine, and teacher training as traditional characteristics, which limits its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall popularity of related major categories is stable. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Yunnan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from 285,700 in 2025. Based on the 2025 physics category proportion of 60.7%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 229,400, an increase of about 56,000 from 173,300 in 2025, which will intensify competition. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Yunnan, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on its application popularity in Yunnan, but as a 211 university, it still offers cost-effective appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has already dropped significantly to 39237, the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province has increased substantially by about 32% leading to intensified competition, and the university's ranking is steadily rising but lacks A-class disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to slightly decline from the 2025 level. The predicted minimum ranking is about 40037, with a range of 39537–40537.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 39537–40537, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<39537), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Oral Medicine and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>40537), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
